description_long: This sculpture depicts two seated male figures, each with bearded faces and draped robes, positioned on either side of a large cross. At the top of the cross, a dove with outstretched wings is perched, symbolizing peace or divinity. The figures rest upon a rounded base adorned with organic, cloud-like forms, and one figure appears to be holding a globe. The overall composition is highly detailed, with intricate folds in the garments and expressive facial features. The sculpture is rendered in a gray, stone-like material, giving it a solemn and monumental appearance. The back of the sculpture is less detailed, focusing attention on the front-facing figures and cross.
description: A detailed stone sculpture of two robed male figures seated beside a cross, topped with a dove, on a rounded base with cloud-like forms.
description_view_0: Front view showing both male figures, the cross, the dove, and the globe held by one figure, with all major details visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the left figure and the depth of the cross and dove, with the globe partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of both figures and the cross, with minimal detail and a focus on the sculpture's mass.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the profile of the right figure and the cross, with the globe less visible.
attribute_subject_matter: two robed male figures with a cross and dove
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
